notes: Indoor dust and particulate control. Depict measurement, HEPA cleaning and filtration exactly as taught (laser particle counter, HEPA vacuum, MERV/HEPA filters). Bright, clean Australian indoor settings, metric context. No on-image text, no brand names/logos.

images.context: Course hero for 'Dust and Particulates in Indoor Air: Control and Cleaning Strategies'
images.prompt: A professional technician in gloves holding a handheld laser particle counter to measure airborne dust in a bright, modern Australian commercial interior, mid-distance and over the shoulder. Clean lines, natural daylight, calm and precise, focus on the measurement task. Realistic professional photography, aspirational.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no readable screen numbers, no visible dirt or grime, no clutter

images.context: Module 6 — cleaning strategy: HEPA-equipped vacuum on carpet, a major dust reservoir
images.prompt: A close hands-on-task view of a technician slowly and thoroughly vacuuming carpet with a HEPA-equipped, sealed-filtration vacuum cleaner in a bright Australian interior, with a damp microfibre cloth resting on a nearby surface. Focus on the vacuum head and gloved hands, clean and methodical. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no feather duster, no visible dust clouds, no mess

images.context: Module 5 & 7 — filtration: fitting a high-MERV pleated / HEPA filter to control recirculated dust
images.prompt: A close view of a technician's gloved hands sliding a clean high-efficiency pleated filter into an air handler filter slot, an old dust-laden filter set aside for comparison, in a bright Australian plant room. Focus on the clean pleated media and the hands, professional and tidy. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no readable MERV numbers, no heavy grime, no clutter
